<!--
Thanks for contributing to laila! A few things before you hit "Create":

- Make sure CI is green locally: `make lint typecheck test-fast`.
- For user-visible changes, update `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`.
- For new public API or behaviour, add or update docs/tutorials.
-->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Internal / refactor / CI / chore

## Test plan

<!-- How did you verify this works? New tests added? -->

- [ ] Added or updated unit tests
- [ ] Manually verified the change

## Checklist

- [ ] `make lint` passes
- [ ] `make typecheck` passes (or no new mypy errors)
- [ ] `make test-fast` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if user-visible
- [ ] Public API changes are documented

## Related issues

<!-- Closes #123, fixes #456 -->
